description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single deploy stage. Add a job named pages that runs on the default Docker image (no explicit image) and only executes when the commit branch equals the default branch. In the script, run `mkdir .public`, `cp -r ./* .public`, `rm -rf public`, and `mv .public public`. Publish the resulting public directory as a pages artifact, set the environment to production, and define the artifact path as public.
